title: Characteristic organic reactions
summary: 9701 AS — substitution, addition, elimination, and oxidation patterns.
learningObjectives: Classify reaction types in organic chemistry.
State reagents for key syllabus reactions.

simpleExplanation.title: How organic families react
simpleExplanation.summary: Each functional group has characteristic reactions. Recognising type (sub/add/elim/ox) speeds up exam answers.

sections.content: **Characteristic reactions** (13.2) feeds every **organic topic** after 13.1. Tabulate **reagent + condition + product**.
